windsurf.description: Windsurf AI with Cascade Action Phase (16 tools: status, health, models, chat, cascade, switch_model, workspace_list, workspace_switch, workspace_create, system_health, field_experiment, api_version, version_info, compatibility_matrix, migration_path, deprecation_warnings)
windsurf.priority_note: Native Swift MCP server with enterprise features: real-time streaming, advanced caching, plugin system, analytics dashboard, API versioning. Requires: Swift 5.9+, WINDSURF_API_KEY

macos-use.description: DEPRECATED: Now bridged through xcodebuild. DO NOT USE DIRECTLY. All 63 macOS tools accessible via xcodebuild server.
macos-use.priority_note: DISABLED: All 63 tools now accessible through xcodebuild bridge. Direct connection no longer needed.

filesystem.description: Official filesystem operations (pinned to @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem for reproducibility)

sequential-thinking.description: Dynamic problem-solving through thought sequences (Critical for Grisha). Model configured in config.yaml under mcp.sequential_thinking.model

googlemaps.description: DEPRECATED: Now bridged through xcodebuild. DO NOT USE DIRECTLY. Google Maps (11 tools).
googlemaps.priority_note: DISABLED: All 11 tools now accessible through xcodebuild bridge. Direct connection no longer needed.

xcodebuild.description: Unified MCP hub (173+ tools): Xcode Build/Test/Simulators (94 native tools) + macOS-use bridge (63 tools: GUI automation, Vision/OCR, System, Terminal, Calendar, Notes, Mail, Finder) + Google Maps bridge (11 tools: geocode, directions, street view, places) + Windsurf IDE bridge (5 tools: chat, cascade, models, status, switch). All native Swift backends accessed through single connection.
xcodebuild.priority_note: Unified hub: local build with multi-backend bridge. Requires: macOS 14.5+, Xcode 16.x+, Node.js 18.x+. Bridges mcp-server-macos-use, mcp-server-googlemaps, and mcp-server-windsurf Swift binaries via stdio.

chrome-devtools.description: Chrome DevTools Protocol for browser automation (Note: requires Chrome 145+, current: 144 - may have issues)

vibe.description: Mistral AI-powered CLI for self-healing, debugging, code review, and deep coding. Tools: vibe_prompt, vibe_analyze_error, vibe_implement_feature, vibe_code_review, vibe_smart_plan, vibe_ask, vibe_check_db, vibe_get_system_context, vibe_get_config, vibe_configure_model, vibe_set_mode, vibe_configure_provider, vibe_session_resume, vibe_execute_subcommand, vibe_list_sessions, vibe_session_details, vibe_reload_config, vibe_which (18 tools).
vibe.priority_note: Runs in programmatic CLI mode (--output json), not interactive TUI. Max output: 500KB.

memory.description: Knowledge graph for persistent memory (SQLite + ChromaDB). Tools: create_entities, add_observations, create_relation, search, get_entity, list_entities, delete_entity, ingest_verified_dataset, trace_data_chain.

graph.description: Knowledge Graph visualization and interactive exploration. Tools: generate_mermaid, get_node_details, get_related_nodes, get_graph_json.

puppeteer.description: High-speed Headless Browser (Puppeteer) for web searching, navigation, screenshots, element interaction, and JavaScript execution
puppeteer.priority_note: For web tasks: searching info, checking weather, scraping data, interacting with websites

duckduckgo-search.description: Fast web search via DuckDuckGo HTML screen scraping. No API key required.

golden-fund.description: Golden Fund Knowledge Base (8 tools): search_golden_fund, probe_entity, ingest_dataset, add_knowledge_node, analyze_and_store, get_dataset_insights, store_blob, retrieve_blob. Semantic search, entity probing, data analysis storage.

context7.description: Context7 Documentation Server - Provides context-aware documentation for libraries and frameworks.

whisper-stt.description: Speech-to-Text via Whisper (Local or Brain API). Used for voice recording and transcription.

devtools.description: Developer Tools (Linter, Analysis, MCP Inspector CLI & Sandbox) wrapper (Ruff, Oxlint, Knip, Pyrefly, Inspector, Health, Sandbox). PRIMARY for system self-analysis and tool verification.

github.description: Advanced GitHub API integration (PRs, Issues, Search, File Ops). Requires GITHUB_TOKEN.

redis.description: Redis Observability and State Inspection. Tools: redis_get, redis_set, redis_keys, redis_delete, redis_info.

data-analysis.description: Pandas-based Data Analysis Engine (10 tools): read_metadata, analyze_dataset, generate_statistics, create_visualization, data_cleaning, data_aggregation, interpret_column_data, run_pandas_code. Supports CSV, Excel, JSON, Parquet.

postgres.description: PostgreSQL Database Access (Experimental). Requires local PostgreSQL 17 installation.
postgres.priority_note: Disabled by default. Used for structured data querying when SQLite is insufficient.

react-devtools.description: React-specific introspection tools (Fiber tree, Props, State). Enhances autonomous React development capabilities.
react-devtools.priority_note: Works in conjunction with chrome-devtools-mcp for browser interaction.

tour-guide.description: Interactive Virtual Tour Control (Internal). Real-time synchronization between Agent movement and User Map View. Tools: tour_start, tour_stop, tour_pause, tour_resume, tour_look, tour_set_speed.
tour-guide.priority_note: Native Python service handled by ToolDispatcher. No separate process required.
